CustomField.description: CRM-547 : TimeLine Avancement MES CMI MCOSF-195: Remplacement CMI_Demande_CMI__c par Origine_de_la_demande__c
CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Origine_de_la_demande__c, 'CMI'), Case(CMI_Avancement_MES__c, "Rdv à prendre", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineMES/timelineRdvAPrendre.png", "", 26, 656), "Rdv confirmé pris, MES à faire", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineMES/timelineRdvConfirmer.png", "", 26, 656), "MES faite, à facturer", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineMES/timelineMESFaite.png", "", 26, 656), "MES à revoir", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineMES/timelineARevoir.png", "", 26, 656), "Facturé", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineMES/timelineMESFacturer.png", "", 26, 656), "Non-facturable", IMAGE("/resource/TimelineMES/timelineMESNonFacturer.png", "", 26, 656), IMAGE("/resource/TimelineMES/timelineRdvAPrendre.png", "", 26, 656)) ,null )
CustomField.label: Avancement
